text:
횉채챨횪창챰챵창처챕챵책, Ryan.

횂청 챦챔챰횪챘챔 4 첼챠창횪챨첼 2012 찾., 3:17:48:

RS> What triggered these messages to appear?

RS> What does not work as a result?

RS> -r


When booting I get this messages on console. All seems to work.

I update world+kernel from Jun 10 to Sen 30. Rebuild SNMP again from
fresh ports. Assert did not disappear
